arts.ttl: Thomas Frank drops selection hint as Brentford get double boost ahead of Aston Villa test
arts.sum: Bees head coach Thomas Frank has confirmed that both Mathias Jensen and Christian Norgaard will be ready to face Unai Emery’s men in a game that could see the home side move to within a point of Villa if they win. Brentford will be boosted by the return of two players for Saturday's 5.30pm Premier League clash with Aston Villa.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa scout Celtic star as Unai Emery considers transfer options
arts.sum: Aston Villa have watched Cameron Carter-Vickers as they consider their defensive rebuild ahead of the summer transfer window. Aston Villa scout Celtic star as Unai Emery considers transfer options

arts.ttl: Brentford receive double injury boost ahead of Aston Villa clash
arts.sum: Brentford receive a double injury boost ahead of Saturday's Premier League clash against Aston Villa at the Gtech Community Stadium.

arts.ttl: Pundits disagree as Marco Asensio 'masterstroke' highlighted in Brentford vs Aston Villa verdict
arts.sum: But Villa boss Unai Emery has made clear that he wants the club to be repeat offenders when it comes to playing in the Champions League, and the Bees are one of several club standing in their way of helping realise that vision come May. Few people could have envisaged Brentford vs Aston Villa being a key game in the chase for Champions League football at the start of the season, but that is the way it is turning out.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Aston Villa among PL clubs scouting 'really strong' centre-back who's won nine trophies this decade
arts.sum: TBR Football can exclusively confirm that Aston Villa, Everton, Brighton & Hove Albion and Crystal Palace are all in pursuit of one of the best...

arts.ttl: Every word Unai Emery said about starting Asensio, Champions League curse and Brentford's surprise form
arts.sum: Every word Unai Emery said about starting Asensio, Champions League curse and Brentford's surprise form Unai Emery sat down with the media at Bodymoor Heath ahead of Aston Villa's trip to Brentford in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Ross Barkley and Amadou Onana injury updates ahead of Aston Villa's trip to Brentford
arts.sum: Unai Emery has confirmed Ross Barkley remains unavailable for Aston Villa's trip to Brentford on Saturday, while Amadou Onana is close to returning after he has started working with the team in training. Ross Barkley and Amadou Onana injury updates ahead of Aston Villa's trip to Brentford

arts.ttl: Preston v Villa and Brighton-Forest FA Cup ties on BBC
arts.sum: The BBC will show the FA Cup quarter-final between Preston - the only club outside the top flight left in the competition - against Aston Villa.

arts.ttl: Brentford vs. Aston Villa: Unai Emery's side bidding to end 78-year streak in Premier League game
arts.sum: Aston Villa will be bidding to end a 78-year streak when they square off against Brentford at the Gtech Community Stadium on Saturday evening.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa ticket details vs Preston as huge allocation granted for FA Cup quarter-final
arts.sum: Aston Villa ticket details vs Preston as huge allocation granted for FA Cup quarter-final Aston Villa have confirmed ticket details for the trip to Preston North End in the FA Cup quarter-finals.
